ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., AFG for Afghanistan) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region to which the country belongs */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series (e.g., Population, total) */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code for the series (e.g., SP.POP.TOTL) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source_institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution that provided the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset is publicly accessible */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_series_name FOREIGN KEY ("series_name") REFERENCES series ("series_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the data point belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Actual value of the data point */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the data point */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Specific source of the data point */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data point */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code for the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the series */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the series */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the series information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Whether the year is a leap year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the year information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access event */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity verification */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the file is publicly accessible */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity verification */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the file is publicly accessible */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Whether the version is the latest */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the version information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key for the metadata (e.g., collection_method) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value for the metadata (e.g., survey) */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., methodological, administrative) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tag */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the tag information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Whether the comment is flagged for review */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
